tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh, mm-mm[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
I could eat that girl for lunch[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah, she dances on my tongue[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Tastes like she might be the one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I could never get enough[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
I could buy her so much stuff[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
It's a craving, not a crush, huh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
"Call me when you're there[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Said, "I bought you somethin' rare"[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
And I left it under "Claire"[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
So now, she's comin' up the stairs[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
So I'm pullin' up a chair[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm puttin' up my hair[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, I think you were made for me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Somebody write down the recipe[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Been tryin' hard not to overeat[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
You're just so sweet[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
I'll run a shower for you like you want[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
Clothеs on the counter for you, try 'em on[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
If I'm allowеd, I'll help you take 'em off[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
Huh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
I could eat that girl for lunch[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah, she dances on my tongue[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Tastes like she might be the one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I could never get enough[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
I could buy her so much stuff[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
It's a craving, not a crush, huh[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh, I just wanna get her off, oh[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, oh[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
She's takin' pictures in the mirror[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh my God, her skin's so clear[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Tell her, "Bring that over here"[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
You need a seat? I'll volunteer[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
Now she's smilin' ear to ear[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
She's the headlights, I'm the deer[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
I've said it all before, but I'll say it again[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm interested in more than just bein' your friend[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
I don't wanna break it, just want it to bend[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
Do you know how to bend?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
I could eat that girl for lunch[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
She dances on my tongue[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I know it's just a hunch[/tab]
                     N.C.
But she might be the one


[Outro]
